### Install
1. Download the APK file below
2. Enable "Install from unknown sources" on your Android device
3. Install the APK
4. Launch and download required AI models on first run

### Requirements
- Android 8.0+ (API 26)
- ~2GB free storage for AI models

### AI Models
| Model | Purpose | Size |
|-------|---------|------|
| Whisper Tiny | Speech Recognition | ~75 MB |
| NLLB-200 Distilled | Translation | ~600 MB |
| Piper Voices | Text-to-Speech | ~63 MB each |
